Notice Of Motion And Otion To Compel Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Ilona Brusil, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Etlya Oykherman
Boris Treyzon, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Frieds of Adult DAy Health Care Inc.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Etlya Oykherman's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
